---
title: "rig sysreqs"
---

<!-- Generated by website/gen-cli-reference.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

## `rig sysreqs`

```text
Description:
  Manage system libraries and tools. This currently includes a very
  restricted set of tools, that are needed for running `R CMD check`.
  Run `rig sysreqs list` for a complete list.

Usage: rig sysreqs [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

Commands:
  add   Install system library or tool
  info  Information about a system tool
  list  List available system libraries and tools
  help  Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
      --json
          JSON output

      --user
          Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

      --admin
          Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')
```

### `rig sysreqs add`

```text
Install system library or tool

Usage: rig sysreqs add [OPTIONS] <name>...

Arguments:
  <name>...  system tool to install

Options:
  -a, --arch <arch>  Architecture to install for [default: arm64] [possible values: arm64, x86_64]
      --user         Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin        Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help         Print help
```

### `rig sysreqs info`

```text
Information about a system tool

Usage: rig sysreqs info [OPTIONS] <name>

Arguments:
  <name>  system tool to show

Options:
      --json   JSON output
      --user   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help   Print help
```

### `rig sysreqs list`

```text
List available system libraries and tools

Usage: rig sysreqs list [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --json   JSON output
      --user   Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
      --admin  Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)
  -h, --help   Print help
```
